Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Hey, Yuka-tan, you ever check out the student message boards and stuff?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You know how last week that girl was found by the front gate?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, now they're sayin' it was an angry spirit from this one ghost story that did it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}C'mon, nobody really believes that stuff. Right...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I-It's probably made up. We don't need to go into details, do we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Good evening and welcome to Junpei's Believe It, or Don't.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}There are many strange things in this world...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Legend has it, late at night, after everyone has gone home...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}A maniacal ghost roams the halls and devours anyone caught in its grasp![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}The other day, this friend of mine—let's call him "Witness A."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Anyway, he said to me, "Hey, Iori, I saw something weird the other day."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}He sounded so serious, so I asked him what he'd seen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}And claims he watched her go into the school on the night before the incident![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I told him, "I don't believe it. Not even for a second!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That girl from 2-E ain't the type to go wanderin' around at night![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But Witness A was as white as a sheet. He swore to me it was true![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}If the girl was found unconscious at school, then maybe the ghost really did make her its dinner![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}It all made sense! She went to the school at night, and walked right into its deadly trap![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}I felt a chill run down my spine, and I broke into a cold sweat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Yes, there truly are some strange things in this world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Seriously? Not one word about my amazing performance just now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I'm not so interested in the ghost part, but it does sound like it's worth investigating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}So you're afraid of ghosts huh, Yuka-tan? Didn't know you were such a chicken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Each of us will ask around for the rest of the week and gather information.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}This ghost story is just a bunch of nonsense! I'll show you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Sounds good to me. The story is a bit unnerving, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
